mapper.select: SELECT GOODS_NO, GOODS_NAME, GOODS_SORT, GOODS_CATEGORY, GOODS_PRICE, GOODS_IMG_PATH, GOODS_IMG_RE FROM GOODS LEFT JOIN GOODS_IMG USING (GOODS_NO) WHERE GOODS_DEL_FL = 'N' AND GOODS_IMG_ORDER = 0 ORDER BY GOODS_NO DESC

SELECT GOODS_NO, GOODS_NAME, GOODS_SORT, GOODS_CATEGORY, GOODS_PRICE, GOODS_INFO, DELIVERY_COST, GOODS_SELLER, GOODS_IMG_PATH, GOODS_IMG_RE FROM GOODS LEFT JOIN GOODS_IMG USING (GOODS_NO) WHERE GOODS_NO = ${goodsNo} AND GOODS_DEL_FL = 'N' AND GOODS_IMG_ORDER = 0
SELECT BOARD_IMG_RE "rename" FROM BOARD_IMAGE UNION SELECT GOODS_IMG_RE "rename" FROM GOODS_IMG
